title: Samsung Wallet Platform
description: Architecture and delivery of Samsung Wallet capabilities across multiple regions, combining Android security, backend microservices, payment orchestration and financial integrations.
highlights: Backend services built with scalable cloud-native patterns.
Android security using FIDO2, Passkeys, Android Keystore and biometrics.
Payment workflows designed with reliability, idempotency and observability.
Integration with financial ecosystems including Pix and Open Finance.

title: Open Finance & Pix Ecosystem
description: Designed and evolved financial services enabling secure transactions, account connectivity and payment experiences within the Brazilian Open Finance ecosystem.

title: Secure Authentication Platform
description: Implemented modern authentication approaches focused on passwordless security, device trust and cryptographic identity.

title: Distributed Systems Architecture
description: Designed backend architectures focused on availability, scalability and operational excellence.
highlights: Observability with metrics, logs and distributed tracing.
Reliability patterns: retries, circuit breakers, dead-letter queues.
